chapter_title.en: Chapter on Zihar (declaring one's Wife Unlawful Like a mother)

text: 4846 - وَ سَأَلَ عَمَّارُ بْنُ مُوسَى اَلسَّابَاطِيُّ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : عَنِ اَلظِّهَارِ اَلْوَاجِبِ قَالَ "اَلَّذِي يُرِيدُ بِهِ اَلرَّجُلُ اَلظِّهَارَ بِعَيْنِهِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4846 - Ammar ibn Musa Al-Sabati asked Abu Abdullah (as) about the obligatory ẓihar (a form of divorce by comparison).
Imam (as) replied: "It is when a man explicitly intends by his statement to perform ẓihar itself."
